name: Arista Networks / Arista 网络
sector: Cloud networking / 云与数据中心网络
summary: Arista Networks 提供云和 AI 数据中心以太网交换平台，处于 GPU 集群从单机算力走向大规模网络互连的关键环节。 / Arista Networks provides cloud and AI data-center Ethernet switching platforms, sitting in the key interconnect layer as GPU clusters scale from single-node compute to large fabrics.
summaryZh: Arista Networks 提供云和 AI 数据中心以太网交换平台，处于 GPU 集群从单机算力走向大规模网络互连的关键环节。
summaryEn: Arista Networks provides cloud and AI data-center Ethernet switching platforms, sitting in the key interconnect layer as GPU clusters scale from single-node compute to large fabrics.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时
updateCadence.财务与公告: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每日
updateCadence.主营业务: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周
updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.description: 公司设计、销售和支持数据中心、云、AI、园区和路由网络的高速交换、路由、软件和自动化平台。 / The company designs, sells, and supports high-speed switching, routing, software, and automation platforms for data-center, cloud, AI, campus, and routing networks.
business.descriptionZh: 公司设计、销售和支持数据中心、云、AI、园区和路由网络的高速交换、路由、软件和自动化平台。
business.descriptionEn: The company designs, sells, and supports high-speed switching, routing, software, and automation platforms for data-center, cloud, AI, campus, and routing networks.
revenueModel: 云网络交换平台 / cloud switching platforms
路由与软件 / routing and software
服务与支持 / service and support

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteZh: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。
segments.noteEn: The batch draft uses only verifiable total revenue; segment revenue split requires later manual annual-report table review.

business.thesis: AI 集群扩张会把瓶颈从单颗 GPU 延伸到东西向流量、以太网交换、延迟和网络可靠性，Arista 是这一层的代表性美股公司。 / AI cluster expansion extends bottlenecks from individual GPUs to east-west traffic, Ethernet switching, latency, and network reliability, making Arista a representative US-listed company in this layer.
business.thesisZh: AI 集群扩张会把瓶颈从单颗 GPU 延伸到东西向流量、以太网交换、延迟和网络可靠性，Arista 是这一层的代表性美股公司。
business.thesisEn: AI cluster expansion extends bottlenecks from individual GPUs to east-west traffic, Ethernet switching, latency, and network reliability, making Arista a representative US-listed company in this layer.
riskNotes: 云大客户资本开支、以太网与专用互连路线竞争会影响订单节奏。 / Hyperscaler capex and competition between Ethernet and proprietary fabrics can affect order timing.
客户集中和 AI 网络产品迭代可能放大收入波动。 / Customer concentration and AI networking product transitions can amplify revenue volatility.

failureConditions.condition: AI 集群网络、光互连或高速交换需求低于公司披露趋势。
failureConditions.conditionZh: AI 集群网络、光互连或高速交换需求低于公司披露趋势。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if AI cluster networking, optical interconnect, or high-speed switching demand falls below company-disclosed trends.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪云客户资本开支、AI 网络订单、产品认证、价格和毛利率。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪云客户资本开支、AI 网络订单、产品认证、价格和毛利率。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor cloud customer capex, AI networking orders, product qualification, pricing, and margins.

failureConditions.condition: 技术路线被替代，或客户转向自研/其他供应商。

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Large cloud or platform customers affect demand expectations, but the transmission sits on the purchasing and application side and is weaker than supply bottlenecks.

themeExposure.role: AI 集群以太网交换层
themeExposure.roleZh: AI 集群以太网交换层
themeExposure.rationale: GPU 集群扩张会提升东西向流量、以太网交换和网络软件的重要性，Arista 比普通应用公司更接近算力互连瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: GPU 集群扩张会提升东西向流量、以太网交换和网络软件的重要性，Arista 比普通应用公司更接近算力互连瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: GPU cluster expansion raises the importance of east-west traffic, Ethernet switching, and network software, placing Arista closer to the compute interconnect bottleneck than ordinary application companies.
